response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:49: Identified as an introductory talk between Yuzuki Choco, Shirogane Noel, and Yukihana Lamy. 2. 02:50: Identified the song 'サマーチョコレート' (Summer Chocolate) from on-screen text. Songwriter is 桃原莉乃, composer is 加藤藍也. 3. Performed a search for the lyrics, which yielded no results. 4. Transcribed the lyrics directly from the audio of the performance to ensure completion.
response.global_summary: The video begins with VTubers Yuzuki Choco, Shirogane Noel, and Yukihana Lamy engaging in an introductory segment, setting the scene for their upcoming performance. Following the intro, Yuzuki Choco and Yukihana Lamy perform the song 'Summer Chocolate' (サマーチョコレート) on a virtual stage.

scenes.description: The video starts with Yuzuki Choco, Shirogane Noel, and Yukihana Lamy in a virtual room, discussing their upcoming performance and special 'members-only' content. They are standing in front of a computer, and there is an eye chart on the wall.
scenes.performer_in_video: Yuzuki Choco, Shirogane Noel, Yukihana Lamy

scenes.description: Yuzuki Choco and Yukihana Lamy move to a virtual stage and perform the song 'Summer Chocolate'. On-screen text indicates the title is 'サマーチョコレート', with lyrics by 桃原莉乃 and music by 加藤藍也.
scenes.original_artist: 桃原莉乃, 加藤藍也
